cd VirtualPaper\src\VirtualPaper.ML\StyleTransfer

# Create a virtual environment
.\evn\python\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt --target .\env\packages

# Generate Python code from the .proto file
.\env\python\python.exe -m grpc_tools.protoc -I..\..\VirtualPaper.Grpc.Service\Protos --python_out=.\Service --grpc_python_out=.\Service ..\..\VirtualPaper.Grpc.Service\Protos\style_transfer.proto
